title: Olde Worlde
description: "Olde World" is a meticulously crafted Minecraft modpack designed to transport players back to the beloved Alpha and Beta eras, infusing the latest Minecraft versions with a profound sense of nostalgia.
body:
# Olde Worlde
_Olde Worlde_ is a meticulously crafted Minecraft modpack designed to transport players back to the beloved Alpha and Beta eras, infusing the latest Minecraft versions with a profound sense of nostalgia. This Modrinth creation by RetroDim goes far beyond simple texture changes, aiming to recreate the distinct "feel" of early Minecraft.

Players will rediscover the iconic, wild terrain generation, including the signature far lands, reminiscent of a time before modern biomes. The modpack reintroduces classic lighting, sound effects, and even the simpler, more mysterious progression systems that defined the game's nascent stages. From the blocky, yet charming, aesthetics to the less cluttered UI, "Olde World" offers an authentic blast from the past. It's a curated journey for veterans yearning for the game's formative years and a unique historical experience for newer players, proving that sometimes, "Olde" is truly golden.

# WARNING
This is not a 1 to 1 modpack for beta/alpha versions of Minecraft. This is pre-modern recreation using a bunch of mods that recreate a TON of features, mechanics, world generators and vibes of Alpha Minecraft. This is still Modern minecraft, and will likely have bugs and glitches. Certain mods that add "Mobs, Items, Mechanics" may be edited and or removed to help keep the pre-modern feel; So please keep world backups. tysm <3

# Features
- LAN anywhere, With anyone thanks to [e4mc](https://e4mc.link/)
- Outvoted and Forgotten mobs thanks to [Friends&Foes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/friends-and-foes)
- Wandering Player Mobs just like in beta 1.7.3
- Modern Minecraft but how it could have been **GOLDEN**
- Many more features and classic adventures await!
